name: VEFaaS Sandbox
description: Sandbox backend powered by VEFaaS with SSH-based command execution and remote workspaces.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: Workspace mode. The VEFaaS backend currently supports remote canonical workspaces.

command.label: Provisioner Command
command.help: Path or command name for the VEFaaS sandbox provisioner.

functionId.label: Function ID
functionId.help: Optional VEFaaS webserver sandbox function id forwarded to the provisioner.

region.label: Region
region.help: Optional VEFaaS region passed to the provisioner.

endpoint.label: Endpoint
endpoint.help: Optional VEFaaS control-plane endpoint passed to the provisioner.

image.label: Image
image.help: Sandbox image that contains opencode and the required runtime tools.

remoteWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Workspace Dir
remoteWorkspaceDir.help: Primary writable workspace inside the VEFaaS sandbox.

remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Agent Dir
remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.help: Agent workspace mirror path when workspaceAccess is read-only.

ttlSeconds.label: TTL Seconds
ttlSeconds.help: Requested sandbox lifetime before provider-side cleanup.

timeoutSeconds.label: Command Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for provisioner operations such as create and ssh-config.

resources.label: Resources
resources.help: Optional CPU, memory, and GPU request forwarded to the provisioner.

network.label: Network
network.help: Optional network placement and egress policy forwarded to the provisioner.

opencode.label: OpenCode
opencode.help: OpenCode remote attempt settings used by the VEFaaS provisioner.

opencode.entrypoint.label: OpenCode Entrypoint
opencode.entrypoint.help: Command inside the sandbox image used to start OpenCode attempts.

opencode.eventMode.label: OpenCode Event Mode
opencode.eventMode.help: Event stream format emitted by the remote OpenCode attempt. Only ndjson is supported.

opencode.artifactDir.label: OpenCode Artifact Dir
opencode.artifactDir.help: Remote directory where OpenCode writes attempt artifacts, logs, and snapshots.

opencode.acp.label: OpenCode ACP
opencode.acp.help: Register ACP backend vefaas-opencode and run opencode acp inside VEFaaS.

opencode.env.label: OpenCode Env
opencode.env.help: Environment variables passed to the remote opencode acp process.
